cases.expected: Opening the conversation from request detail keeps the request bundle and explicit return path.
Opening the conversation from the message cluster keeps the cluster return label and path.
Question -> check -> receipt all stay inside the conversation family.
Local acknowledgement and pending review remain separate from final delivery or resolution.
Callback status stays visible but does not promise progress while the route is degraded.
Repair replaces reply or callback as the dominant patient action when the route is unsafe.
Reload and stale recovery preserve anchor, blocked summary, and in-shell recovery guidance.
The patient can still read context and see the next step without being redirected home.
Expired reply windows remain readable and continuity-safe.
Refresh restores the selected conversation route and anchor when continuity remains valid.
